subject: API rate limits - we're being throttled
body: Hi support team, we integrated your API 3 weeks ago and everything was fine until today when we started getting 429 errors. We haven't changed our code. Our usage is within the plan limits according to our dashboard. This is blocking our product launch scheduled for tomorrow. Account ID: ACC-88291. Can someone from the engineering or API team look at this ASAP?

subject: Double charged on invoice - please refund
body: Hello billing department, we have been charged twice for our February subscription. Invoice #5521 and #5522 both show $2,499 for the same billing period. Our AP team has flagged this. Please issue a refund for one charge or credit it to our next invoice. I've attached both invoices for reference. Contact: Michael Chen, AP Manager

subject: Partnership proposal - white-label integration
body: Dear team, I'm the VP of Business Development at TechVentures. We serve 200+ mid-market clients who could benefit from your platform. We'd like to explore a white-label partnership where we resell your solution under our brand. Potential ARR impact: $2M+ in year one. I'd love to set up a call with your partnership or sales team this week.

subject: DMCA takedown notice - copyright infringement claim
body: FORMAL LEGAL NOTICE: MediaGroup LLC hereby notifies you that content hosted at [URL] infringes upon our registered copyright #TXu-2-345-678. Pursuant to 17 U.S.C. Section 512(c), you are required to expeditiously remove or disable access to the infringing material. Failure to comply within 48 hours will result in legal action. Please confirm receipt and compliance. Attorney: Jennifer Walsh, Esq.

subject: New hire equipment request - starting Monday
body: Hi IT team, we have a new engineer starting this Monday - Alex Rivera. Please set up the following: MacBook Pro 16" M3, external monitor, keyboard/mouse, and all standard software licenses (Slack, Jira, GitHub). Alex will need access to the engineering VPN and staging environment. Manager: David Park (engineering). Start date: 2024-01-22.

subject: Memory leak in production - degrading over 24h
body: Automated alert: Memory usage on web-server-cluster-03 has been increasing steadily for 24 hours. Current usage: 87% (7.0GB/8GB). Pattern suggests a memory leak in the recently deployed v2.4.1 release. At current rate, OOM crash expected in approximately 6 hours. Related: 3 customer tickets about slow page loads opened in last 2 hours. Engineering team should be notified immediately.
